info.name: College System API
info.description: Complete collection of College System Backend API endpoints

request.description: Health check endpoint to verify server is running
Update authenticated non-student user profile (phone, address, avatar)
Upload users from Excel file (Admin only)
Update student profile with optional avatar upload
Get courses for the authenticated student
Get details of a specific course
Get grade breakdown for a specific course
Get available course offerings for registration
Register for courses (Students and Leaders only)
Get schedule for the authenticated student
Get all materials (with optional course filter)
Get signed URL to download material
Get all active course offerings (Admin only)
Get exam schedule for student (Student only)
Start a new attendance session (Doctor/TA only)
Get active attendance sessions for instructor
Get details of a specific attendance session
Student scans QR code to mark attendance
Get schedule for a specific teacher (Doctor/TA only)
Create notifications for multiple users (Admin only)
Add a comment to a post
